titleStmt.title: SII 7.375: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 375. (A.R. No. 170 of 1901). ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śrīgaṇādhipatāyē namaḥ . śrīsarasvatyāyē(ṁ) namaḥ . śrīguru
ni¨rvighnamastu . namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaratāravē . [trai ]
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī . (jayā)jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakavaruṣa 1502 saṁdu mūraneya va¨rtamāna vikramasaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍhada ba
haḷa Āmāvāse sōmavāra puṁṇyakāladallu śrīmaṁmahārājādhirāja rā(ja)
japaramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīraṁgamahārāyaru vidyānagarada siṁhāsanadalū kuḷitu
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁda sakala va(ṁ)¨rnadha(ṁ)¨rmaṁgaḷaṁnu rājyavaṁnu pratipālisuva kā
ladallū Ā rāyara nirūpadiṁda saṁkaṇanāyakaru bārakūrarājyavaṁnu Āccappa
voḍeyarige pālisi Āvara nirūpadiṁda maṇigārakēriyavoḷagaṇa sōmanā
thadēvara saṁnidhiyalū narayanabaḷiya yiṁmnaḍi gaṇapaseṭṭiya saṁtānada yīsvaraṁ
ṇaseṭi Āvara kūḍaṇa saṁkamaseṭiti yi ka¨rtarū saha māḍida dha¨r(ṁ)ma nityachatra dha(ṁ)
[¨rma] jana 6 ke sōmanāthadēvara nayirutyada dikkinalli kaṭisida maṭhake biṭa bāḷu brahmā
bhāgeya Ālaṁjiyavūroḷage jarada mūlada bāḷu tōṭada gaddeya
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu gadde hariva tōḍiṁdaṁ baḍagalū kōṭakēriya hala
ra gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalū hariva vā dāriya yi mūru gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
teṁkalū gaḍiyoḷage bittuva gade muḍe 1 yidakke gēṇiya pūda
nāgarasarige kaṭuderu muḍi 8 yeṁṭanuḷidu maṭake Akki muḍi 22
caruvaḷiya bayaloḷage cauḷikēri bastibāḷiṁda paḍuva sa¨rvvamānyada bācana ga
ḍiyiṁda baḍagakaṭeya nāraṇaseṭigaḍi Ā bastigaḍiyiṁda mūḍakaṭe nāraṇase
ṭegaḍiyiṁda teṁka gade mu 1 . 0 keṁmaṁṇa bayaloḷage huṇuseAḍi Ūrāḷara
kēśahebārana gaḍiyiṁda paḍuva tōḍiṁda baḍaga mādavahaṁdeya gaḍiyiṁ
da mūḍa huṇuseAḍiŪrāḷara gaḍiyiṁda teṁka gadde mu 2 kōṇibayaloḷa
ge Oḍeya hōḷara gaḍiyiṁda paḍuva dēvasvadiṁda baḍaga huṇuseAḍiŪrā
ḷa vāsudēvahebāra gaḍiyiṁda mūḍa maṇigārakēriya halara gaḍi kuñaṇa
kaḷa gaḍiyiṁda teṁka gadde mu 1 . 0 Aṁtu gade mu 4 . ge teru kaḷadu śuddha naḍava Akki
muḍi 20 paḍuva kēriyoḷage ceṁnappaseṭṭiheggaḍegaḍiyiṁda baḍaga basti
ya bāḷa gaḍiyiṁda teṁka gade muḍi ø ĀlamāU cōḷikēriya bastiya
bāḷiṁda baḍaga mādaṇa vāsudēvahōḷara gaḍiyiṁda teṁka gade mu Ø grāma
dēva hōḷara gaḍiyiṁda baḍaga niḍuṁbūra viṭhṭhayana gaḍiyiṁda teṁka gadde muḍi
Arasagadde muḍi 5ø0 ge teru kaḷadu śuddha Akki muḍi 19 kekkaṭiya ceṁnapa
bayalavoḷage cōḷikēriya halara bhaṁḍārigedeya paḍuva maṭada voḍēra gade
yiṁda paḍuva paḍuvamaneya hatvārana gaḍiyiṁda jōsyara maneyaḍi paḍu
va maneya hatvārana gaḍiyiṁda paḍuva maṇigārakēriya halara mākaṇaseṭiya
gaḍiyiṁda baḍaga maneyaḍiyiṁda paḍuva bayala gaḍi vivara cōḷikēriya
halara gaḍiyiṁda baḍaga cōḷikēriya halara paḍuvamane hatvārara gaḍi
yiṁda mūḍa heddāri Aṁcu vōṇiyiṁdaṁ teṁka yī gaḍiyoḷage bittuva ga
dde muḍi 13 maneyaḍi saha yī bāḷige Uṁṭhāda gauḷiya maṁṇakereya nīru
Ā bayalavoḷage paḍuvamaneya hatvārana gaḍiyiṁda paḍuva Aḍigaḷa
gōviṁdana gaḍiyiṁda baḍaga mākaṇaseṭiyara paḍuvamane hatvārara gaḍiyiṁ
da mūḍa paḍuvamaneya hatvārara gaḍiyiṁda teṁka yī gaḍiyoḷage gademu ø0
maṇigārakēriya halara gaḍiyiṁda paḍuva vōṇiyiṁda mūḍa gadde hāne 37 gō
ṭugaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalū hariva hoḷeyiṁda muḍa gade muḍi Ø paḍuvamane ha
tvārara gaḍiyiṁda paḍuva jaṁnara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍa yi gaḍiyoḷage gadde mu
ḍi ø dēva Aṁmaṁṇahatvārara gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalū heddāri Aṁciṁda baḍagalū
halara maneyiṁda teṁka gaḍiyiṁda muḍalū mataṁ cōḷikēriya halara gaḍiyiṁda
mūḍalu cōḷikēriya halara gaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu cōḷikēriya halara gaḍiyiṁda
paḍuvalu yi gaḍiyoḷage gade muḍi 2 . Aṁttu bittuva muḍi haḍubida gade mū
vāne saha muḍi 1 kaṁṇaṁ bāḷayoḷagaṇa gaddeya gaḍi mūḍalu cōḷikēri
ya halara gaḍiyiṁda teṁka Aṁṇahatvā¨rra gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍaga paḍuva mane
hatvā¨rra gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu Aḍigaḷa gōviṁdana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī gaḍiyo
ḷage bittuva gadeya bāḷa ma cōḷikēriya halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva kereyiṁdaṁ mu
ḍa yī gaḍiyoḷagaṇa gaddehāne 10 Aṁttu muḍi 2 . 0 Aṁttu muḍi 19Ø gadege gē
ṇi Akki muḍi 39 teru ge kaḷadu sudha naḍasuva Akki muḍi 8 Aṁtū
ḍi 69 Akṣaradalū Aruvattavoṁbhattu muḍiyakkige dinavoṁdake naḍava
hōAru
Digital edition of SII 7.375 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
